data.entry_description: Judgment VACATED and case REMANDED. Kagan, J., delivered the opinion of the Court, in which Roberts, C. J., and Sotomayor, Kavanaugh, and Jackson, JJ., joined. Jackson, J., filed a concurring opinion, in which Sotomayor, J., joined. Gorsuch, J., filed an opinion concurring in the judgment. Alito, J., filed a dissenting opinion, in which Thomas, J., joined as to Part I, and in which Barrett, J., joined as to Parts II-B, II-C-1, and II-C-2. Barrett, J., filed a dissenting opinion.
